examples: You might have diarrhea or become chronically constipated.
Moreover, meat lacks fiber, so you'd probably be constipated.
The last time we went out, Tyler said the loud music made him constipated.
Especially not when you apparently look rather constipated while riding it (at least the dude in the video did).
But he never evolves into more than a constipated rich guy who communicates in pained glances, curt demands, and other signifiers of manliness.
